posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Idea: Make a column type that can use a grid shape to enter data:

We have several boards that act as a ticket system to make requests or report issues. Often we have 1 request = 1 item that asks for multiple numbers or combinations of data; For example part numbers, quantities and part descriptions. Or orders numbers and project numbers for example.

Problem 1: Different people enter data differently, they can use the text cell freely so the form of the answers differ.
Problem 2: Because of this readability and analysing the data suffers from the different inputs.
